subject: Escalation: guppy blockers for Christchurch | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-0957
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Christchurch. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-0957. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
